name: ken-ai
description: End-to-end Ken AI campaign creation: ICP planning, KenSearch targeting, qualification and segmentation prompts, email copy with review loop, AI personalization prompts, and pure-MCP campaign configuration on the Ken AI platform.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, target, write, review, and push cold-email campaigns
interface.longDescription: Use Ken AI to run the full cold-email campaign-creation workflow on the Ken AI platform: plan a broad ICP with segments, build KenSearch prospect targeting, write qualification and segmentation prompts, draft and review email copy, generate AI personalization prompts, and push everything to the platform through the ken-ai MCP server's OAuth session. No API keys to paste, no local scripts.
defaultPrompt: Plan and configure a new Ken AI cold-email campaign for a client
Show the enrichment status of my Ken AI campaign
